mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM requirement
AND function_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{functionName}, '%')
AND request_department LIKE CONCAT('%', #{requestDepartment}, '%')
AND product_owner LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productOwner}, '%')
AND priority IN
#{p}
AND status IN
#{s}
ORDER BY planned_start_time ASC ORDER BY planned_start_time DESC ORDER BY planned_end_time ASC ORDER BY planned_end_time DESC ORDER BY actual_start_time ASC ORDER BY actual_start_time DESC ORDER BY actual_end_time ASC ORDER BY actual_end_time DESC ORDER BY CASE priority WHEN '紧急' THEN 1 WHEN '高' THEN 2 WHEN '中' THEN 3 WHEN '低' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END ASC ORDER BY CASE priority WHEN '紧急' THEN 1 WHEN '高' THEN 2 WHEN '中' THEN 3 WHEN '低' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END DESC ORDER BY CASE priority WHEN '紧急' THEN 1 WHEN '高' THEN 2 WHEN '中' THEN 3 WHEN '低' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO requirement (function_name, module_name, request_department, request_owner, product_owner, priority, planned_start_time, planned_end_time, actual_start_time, actual_end_time, status, description) VALUES (#{functionName}, #{moduleName}, #{requestDepartment}, #{requestOwner}, #{productOwner}, #{priority}, #{plannedStartTime}, #{plannedEndTime}, #{actualStartTime}, #{actualEndTime}, #{status}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT request_department AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM requirement WHERE request_department IS NOT NULL AND request_department != '' GROUP BY request_department
